## Pre-Brief Invocation Context

This Pre-Brief was triggered by foreman-v2-agent (session-143) requesting IAA pre-brief
confirmation for the governance closure wave of Wave 14. All nine Supabase migration files
were already built and verified under prior IAA sessions (140/141/142). This wave delivers
only the final governance closure documentation.

Phase 0 mode ONLY. IAA does not execute Phases 1–4 in this invocation.

## Step 0.4 — Pre-Brief Artifact (Required Phases, Evidence, Overlays, Specific Rules)

### Qualifying Task: TASK-W14-FINAL-001 + TASK-W14-FINAL-002

---

**task_id**: TASK-W14-FINAL-001 + TASK-W14-FINAL-002 (reviewed together as Wave 14 Final governance closure PR)

**task_summary**: Final governance closure for Wave 14. Update `modules/mat/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` to reflect all 15 Wave 14 GAPs CLOSED with migration↔GAP mapping table. Commit PREHANDOVER proof for session-143 attesting closure. All 9 migration files were previously assured under Batch A/B/C IAA tokens.

**iaa_trigger_category**: AAWP_MAT

**required_phases**: Phases 1, 2, 3, 4 (standard full assurance)

**phase_scope_note**: Per the Orientation Mandate (Phase 1, Step 1.3 — 90/10 Rule), because the migration files are already assured by three prior IAA tokens, the IAA focus for this PR is:
- **90% effort — substantive quality review**: Does the `BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` accurately reflect the build? Are all 15 GAP entries correctly mapped to migration files? Are the migration file names and GAP assignments consistent with what the Batch A/B/C tokens assured? Does the PR claim completeness that is actually verifiable against the prior tokens?
- **10% effort — ceremony admin**: Existence checks only — PREHANDOVER proof present, SCOPE_DECLARATION matches diff, iaa_audit_token format correct.

### Required Content Checks for EA-001 — BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md

IAA will verify the following specific content is present in `modules/mat/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md`:

| # | Content Check | What IAA Verifies |
|---|---------------|-------------------|
| BPT-001 | Wave 14 status marked COMPLETE | The tracker shows Wave 14 as complete (not in-progress, not partial) |
| BPT-002 | All 15 GAPs marked CLOSED | GAP-W01 through GAP-W15 all show CLOSED status |
| BPT-003 | Migration↔GAP mapping table present | A mapping table exists linking each migration file (000000–000008) to its GAP(s) |
| BPT-004 | Migration filenames accurate | The 9 migration filenames in the mapping table exactly match the files assured by Batch A/B/C tokens |
| BPT-005 | GAP-to-FR/TR cross-reference | Each GAP entry correctly cites the FR/TR it closes (FR-089–FR-102 / TR-089–TR-102) |
| BPT-006 | IAA token citations present | The three Batch A/B/C IAA token references are cited (or PREHANDOVER proof references them) |

---

### Required Content Checks for EA-002 — PREHANDOVER Proof

IAA will verify the following per applicable FAIL-ONLY-ONCE rules:

| Rule | What IAA Checks in PREHANDOVER |
|------|-------------------------------|
| A-021 | PREHANDOVER proof must be committed (not just staged) before IAA invocation. IAA confirms via `git log`. |
| A-023 | PREHANDOVER proof must include a ripple/cross-agent assessment section. Foreman must attest whether Wave 14 Final changes (BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER update) trigger any ripple to other agents/modules. |
| A-026 | SCOPE_DECLARATION.md must list every file in `git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD`. IAA counts files in SCOPE vs git diff. Any mismatch → REJECTION-PACKAGE. |
| A-029 | `iaa_audit_token` field in PREHANDOVER proof must use pre-populated reference format (NOT `PENDING`). Expected format: `iaa_audit_token: IAA-session-143-wave14-final-YYYYMMDD-PASS` or equivalent. |
| CORE-013 | Evidence of prior IAA invocation must be present — PREHANDOVER must cite the three Batch A/B/C token references confirming migration coverage. |

### Applicable Overlays at Full Assurance Time

| Overlay | Applicability | Scope |
|---------|---------------|-------|
| **OVL-AM (AAWP_MAT / BUILD_DELIVERABLE)** | APPLICABLE — modified scope | BD-TIER-1 through BD-TIER-5 apply BUT with Orientation Mandate carve-out: because the migrations are pre-assured, BD checks focus on **documentation accuracy** (does BPT correctly describe what was built?) rather than build execution. BD-002 (no stubs), BD-003 (one-time build compliance) apply to the tracker content, not the migration SQL. |

| **FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-001 to A-031** | APPLICABLE — per-rule evaluation | See specific rules below. |

---

### Specific Rules — Standing Hard-Checks for This PR

| Rule | Description | Pre-Brief Advisory |
|------|-------------|-------------------|
| **A-021** | Commit and push before IAA invocation | Foreman must commit ALL four task deliverables before calling IAA. IAA will run `git log` to verify. |
| **A-023** | Ripple assessment mandatory in PREHANDOVER | BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md update: IAA expects foreman to assess whether marking Wave 14 COMPLETE triggers any ripple to `governance/`, `modules/mat/00-app-description/`, or `packages/ai-centre/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md`. Assessment must be in PREHANDOVER, even if conclusion is "no ripple". |
| **A-026** | SCOPE_DECLARATION must match diff exactly | Common failure point. SCOPE must include: `modules/mat/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md`, `PREHANDOVER_PROOF_WAVE_14_FINAL.md` (or equivalent), `.agent-workspace/foreman-v2/memory/session-143-*.md`, `.agent-admin/assurance/iaa-prebrief-wave14-final.md`. Any additional IAA ceremony artifacts written during invocation will be covered by A-031 carve-out. |
| **A-029** | PREHANDOVER `iaa_audit_token` format | Must be pre-populated reference string, not `PENDING`. IAA will issue token matching this reference. |
| **A-031** | IAA ceremony artifacts carve-out | IAA token file and session memory written during assurance are covered by A-031 carve-out — foreman does NOT need to add these to SCOPE_DECLARATION post-invocation. |
| **CORE-013** | IAA invocation evidence | PREHANDOVER must cite this pre-brief (`iaa-prebrief-wave14-final.md`) as pre-brief evidence. |
| **CORE-016** | Token file existence | IAA will write token to `.agent-admin/assurance/iaa-token-session-143-wave14-final-YYYYMMDD.md` after PASS. Foreman must not pre-create this file. |
